title.en: The Blood Saint Palace Lord said.

content.en:
"Lord of the Golden Wings, this is the greatest secret of our Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace!"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord took Ye Tian to a mysterious place and said with a smile.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian saw an ancient big bell, which contained an incomparably terrifying aura, and on top of this big bell, there were three hundred and sixty-five mysterious black characters, each of which seemed to contain an extremely aura.

"This is a primordial divine weapon, and it is the top primordial divine weapon!"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord said.

"Lord of the Golden Wing, you may not know what the Primordial Divine Weapon is, it is a weapon above the Extreme Treasure......"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord introduced a lot to Ye Tian.

In fact, Ye Tian knew about the Primordial Divine Weapon, but he pretended not to know.

After introducing the Primordial Divine Weapon, the Blood Saint Palace Master said: "Actually, the real value is not this Primordial Divine Weapon, but the secret method engraved on this Primordial Divine Weapon-Primordial Zhou Tiantu! Moreover, we found that once we understand one of the words, we will realize a secret method, through which we can integrate this text into the body, and we can break the limits of the bloodline and the physical body. For example, the Abyss Palace Master, he has already comprehended the seven words, and his physical body is far beyond our imagination. Of course, you can't just ignore it. At present, according to our requirements, these nine black characters are most suitable for newcomers to participate in enlightenment, and once all of them are comprehended, the original small Zhou Tian diagram can be formed. Once it is truly done, coupled with the comprehension of the Extreme Space-Time Pole, it will be enough to compare to the Triple Ancestor. "

Subsequently, the Blood Saint Palace Master described the division of the original ancestor to Ye Tian.

After listening to this, Ye Tian had to sigh, the Lord of the Boundless's understanding of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea was too one-sided!

At the beginning, the primordial black armor master fell to the end of the realm, and although the cultivator obtained the inheritance and obtained a lot of benefits, the benefits of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea were also a lot!

For example, this Primordial Divine Weapon, coupled with the three hundred and sixty-five black characters on it, was definitely worth more than Ye Tian's previous cognition.

Moreover, the Lord of the Boundless also said that the Extreme Dao Deep Sea had no hope of breaking through to the Triple Primordial Ancestor, unless it was transformed into the Primordial Black Beast, it seemed that he was not very knowledgeable.

After all, according to the saying of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, if you understand the nine black characters and contain your own body, you can make your bloodline transform, which is comparable to the Triple Ancestor.

It is conceivable that once you understand all the three hundred and sixty-five words, how terrifying the strength should be, maybe it is comparable to the Fourfold Ancestor.

"Unexpected surprise, if you have the opportunity in the future, take this thing away!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But now, he took this treasure away, so many palace masters of the Extreme Deep Sea have arranged countless magic circles here, and even blocked the induction of the primordial black sea.

In other words, it is not possible to enter from the Primordial Black Sea, and you can only enter from a specific entrance.

"Lord of the Golden Wing, as long as you comprehend the Extreme Path and become a Primordial Ancestor, you will be eligible to enter here. It's a pity that so many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea can only be regarded as pseudo-primordial ancestors, and there are too few one-fold primordial ancestors!" the Blood Saint Palace Lord sighed.

For them, only a heavy original ancestor is qualified to cultivate, and the pseudo-original ancestor is too weak to be worthy of their attention, and it cannot be equal to them.

Of course.

Even if it is a new ancestor, it will take a long time to investigate before it is qualified to enter here.

And Ye Tian, the golden-winged Peng bird, has a pure body and is innocent, and he is also a personal disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, so his identity is no problem, so he was allowed to enter here and know the biggest secret of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

If they knew that the Lord of the Golden Wings was Ye Tian's copy body, they would definitely be confused.

In the following days, Ye Tian's replica body was here to comprehend these three hundred and sixty-five black characters.

After a period of time, Ye Tian was roughly enlightened.

"Each of these black characters can be regarded as a combination of an inscription technique and the Extreme Pole Dao, for example, this black text represents a combination of the Extreme Space Pole and a combination similar to the Void Inscription Technique, if you understand this black text, you can directly engrave it on the Pagoda of Will. Three hundred and sixty-five black characters represent three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, if three hundred and sixty-five layers of will pagodas are condensed, and each layer of the will pagoda condenses a black text, how powerful it would be!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he was too far from this realm.

"Although the Void Inscription Technique is good, it is not as good as this black text, in my opinion, this black text should be able to increase the success rate of inscription by thirty percent, in my case it is fifty percent success rate, and once the inscription is successful, the increase in strength should be even greater. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

What's more, these three hundred and sixty-five black characters are one, and the Void Inscription Technique is only a secret technique, which can only be used to engrave the Extreme Path of the Extreme Space.

In the future, if you want to engrave other extreme extreme paths, you have to find other inscription techniques again, and there is no connection between these inscription techniques, it is very messy, how can this kind of systematic secret technique be powerful!

"The luck of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea is too strong, and they have obtained such a secret technique, if those Triple Primordial Ancestors knew that there was such a treasure here, they would definitely destroy the Extreme Dao Deep Sea and snatch this treasure. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, according to the information he knew, the original black armor master was definitely not an ordinary Triple Ancestor, and it was said that the other party had been severely injured and came to the end of the realm.

Even so, the end of the entire realm paid a lot of lives for the pseudo-primordial ancestor and many double primordial ancestors, and this was the only way to desperately kill this hard-hit triple primordial ancestor.

So, why did the other party get hit hard, could it be because of this big bell?

This is a big possibility!

"Fortunately, it is inconvenient to track the Primordial Black Sea, and the owner of the Primordial Black Armor is dead, otherwise this place would have been exposed a long time ago!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, Ye Tian went all out to comprehend the black text that represented the extreme path of the extreme space, if he understood it thoroughly, in the future, he would be able to use this text to engrave it on the Pagoda of Will and impact the realm of the Triple Ancestor.

Comparatively speaking, cultivators only need to successfully engrave one Extreme Dao in the Pagoda of Will, but the Extreme Dao creatures need to fuse nine scripts, which is much more difficult.

However, this is a racial restriction and is difficult to change.
